title: rubus × polituliformis
intro: Rubus × polituliformis, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the red raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis), resulting in a unique and potent plant with various properties. The leaves and roots of Rubus × polituliformis have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable addition to any herbal remedy. Rubus × polituliformis can be prepared in various ways, including as a tea, tincture, or salve, and has been used to treat a range of health issues, from wounds and skin conditions to fever and digestive problems.
